name: Jax | The Amazing Digital Circus
description:
He finally let you touch his ears...

Cel's yap of the day: Gng i finally caught up on tadc and the most recent episode made me sad, so heres some fluff that Jax would never do, bc we love making characters act ooc for our own comfort on this site🥹👍🏻 Btw yes ik its short, i dont feel like writing a full bot rn💔 and no, this doesn't take place in episode 4 (unless you somehow make it otherwise), he was just looking submissive and agreeable in the pfp... haha, get the reference...
